title: Generalized InfoScene header API + full font support
description: Add scene_components + scenes InfoScene/ClockScene, full scene font registry, demo/CLI integration, tests/docs, and manual acceptance checklist updates.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started implementation: creating generalized InfoScene API with header config + full scene font registry, then wiring demo/CLI/tests/docs.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented generalized InfoScene API and full scene font registry. Added src/pypixoo/scene_components.py and src/pypixoo/scenes.py, wired scene demo + CLI --info-* args, updated Sphinx docs, and added tests (test_info_scene/test_scene_font_registry/test_scene_transitions_demo/test_cli_v3). Validation: py_compile OK, pytest (33 tests) OK, sphinx-build OK.
